goal: Ensure malformed DeepSeek strict tool calls follow a bounded repair policy before becoming state failure evidence.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek schema-check --name propose_edit --attempt 3 --arguments '{"schema_version":999,"path":"src/main.rs","intent":42,"expected_effect":"bad","risk_level":"risky","verification_steps":["cargo test"]}' --json
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Malformed strict tool-call arguments can retry forever or be recorded too early because validation is not tied to the harness repair budget.
